title: Zara's Feeling Colors
synopsis: Zara learns to identify and express her different emotions with the help of her loving family, discovering that all feelings are okay and can be shared.

pages.text: Zara feels mad. Her toy broke! Red swirls spin around her like angry clouds. 'I'm MAD!' she says loudly.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes stands with clenched fists surrounded by swirling red angry clouds and jagged red shapes representing anger
illustration.alt: Zara looking angry with red swirls around her

pages.text: Mama comes over. 'I see you're feeling mad, Zara. Mad feels like red fire inside.' Mama gives Zara a big hug.

illustration.description: A mother hugging a young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes while red swirls slowly fade to softer orange and pink colors in the background
illustration.alt: Mama hugging Zara as the red anger colors fade

pages.text: At bedtime, Zara feels sad. Daddy is going away for work. Blue raindrops fall around her like tears.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes sitting on her bed looking sad with blue raindrops and storm clouds surrounding her in the abstract background
illustration.alt: Zara looking sad with blue rain around her

pages.text: 'Sad feels like blue rain,' says Daddy. 'But I'll call you every day. Love stays even when I'm away.'

illustration.description: A father sitting next to a young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes on a bed, with blue rain gradually mixing with warm golden heart shapes representing love
illustration.alt: Daddy comforting Zara with love hearts appearing among blue sadness

pages.text: The next morning, Grandma visits! Zara feels so happy. Bright yellow sunshine bursts all around her like fireworks.

illustration.description: A young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes jumping with joy surrounded by brilliant yellow sunshine rays, golden sparkles, and warm sunny bursts of color
illustration.alt: Zara jumping happily with yellow sunshine all around

pages.text: 'Happy feels like yellow sunshine!' Zara tells Grandma. 'All feelings are okay,' says Grandma. 'Red, blue, yellow - they're all part of you.'

illustration.description: A grandmother and young girl with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes dancing together surrounded by a beautiful rainbow of colors - red swirls, blue raindrops, and yellow sunshine all harmoniously mixed
illustration.alt: Zara and Grandma surrounded by all the feeling colors together

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color represents Zara's angry feelings?
questions.explanation: Red swirls show Zara's mad feelings, like angry fire inside.

questions.question: Why does Zara feel sad?
questions.explanation: Zara feels sad because Daddy has to go away for work.

questions.question: What makes Zara feel happy like yellow sunshine?
questions.explanation: When Grandma comes to visit, Zara feels happy like bright yellow sunshine.

questions.question: What does Grandma say about feelings?
questions.explanation: Grandma tells Zara that all feelings - red, blue, and yellow - are okay and part of her.
